summary.summary: Removes the Javascript implementation of the oref algorithm and related Javascript resources and build references, and begins removing JSON marshalling by converting algorithm code to use native types instead of JSON-encoded intermediates (commits and file deletions as part of the PR). (sources: pr:gordolio/Trio#1317, commit:1183424b8c32, commit:47e3eaaa32b6, diff:e16225287c06)
summary.userFacingImpact: The Javascript oref implementation and its JS bundles/resources were removed so the app now relies on the Swift oref implementation (pr:gordolio/Trio#1317; commit:1183424b8c32; diff:e16225287c06). The codebase also refactors algorithm inputs/outputs to use native Swift types instead of JSON marshalling for pieces like makeProfile and glucose conversion (commit:47e3eaaa32b6; commit:910f761415c7). The PR author reports testing in simulator and in vivo (pr:nightscout/Trio#1317). If you rely on the removed Javascript worker, script files, or the removed setting (useJavascriptOref), those runtime/code-path references will no longer be present (commit:1183424b8c32; diff:e16225287c06).
